MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Stephen West, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff XGS Property Managers.
Daniel Piccinini representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Charles Johnson is present.
JR Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of September 17, 2007 remains set.
